nasb.text: The people of all the earth came to Egypt to buy grain from Joseph, because the famine was severe in all the earth.

esv.text: Moreover, all the earth came to Egypt to Joseph to buy grain, because the famine was severe over all the earth.

cnv.text: 各地的人都到埃及去，向約瑟買糧，因為各地的饑荒都非常嚴重。

ccb.text: 各国的人都到埃及来向约瑟买粮，因为天下到处都是大饥荒。

csbs.text: 各地的人都来到埃及，向约瑟买粮，因为各地的饥荒都非常严重。
